top_signals.title: Rathbones Cut Gilt Exposure in Case Burnham ‘Does a Truss’
top_signals.summary: Rathbones Asset Management has reduced its holdings of UK government bonds to avoid a potential selloff if Andy Burnham boosts spending and raises borrowing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CHART: Mining vs AI – Nvidia sneezes, sheds five BHPs
top_signals.summary: Nvidia lost a trillion dollars this quarter and briefly traded like a value stock. The world's 50 biggest miners, all $2.19 trillion of them, have looked like ones for years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital transformation of money, payments and finance
Korean Won Climbs to Two-Month High on Hynix ADR Inflows
top_signals.summary: The South Korean won advanced to its strongest level since May, supported by dollar inflows tied to SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Africa’s $219 Billion Fund Suspends CEO as Internal Rift Deepens
top_signals.summary: The board of Africa’s largest state-run fund suspended Chief Executive Officer Patrick Dlamini in a late-night move that highlighted the deepening feud at the $219 billion asset manager.

top_signals.title: Libra-Plast to Provide Doors, Hatches for Damen Naval PES Project
top_signals.summary: Damen Naval has signed a procurement contract with Libra-Plast AS in Norway for the delivery of all watertight, weathertight and gastight doors and hatches for the PES project. Under this project, a Damen SIGMA frigate will be built by COTECAR…

top_signals.title: UK P&I Club, TT Club Offer to Acquire Thomas Miller Holdings
top_signals.summary: UK P&I Club and TT Club have announced their joint offer to acquire Thomas Miller Holdings has received shareholder support, with acceptances in excess of 89%.The acquisition offer was made to shareholders on June 18, 2026 by TMH Bidco, a special…
